notes: Case docketed in 2001 (listed as Case 01-3). Listed as 'in process' in GA29_2001 report. Parties: Sung Keon Kim v. Korean Capital Presbytery (Appeal). The actual decision was rendered at GA30 (2002), but the full opinion text is not present in the GA29 minutes. The decision can be found in GA30_2002 at pages 118-120 approximately, but the complete text is not included in the provided OCR output.
